docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROBERT ALLEN KENNEDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMELIA CHARLENE LLACER IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, ROBERT ALLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LLACER, AMELIA CHARLENE T $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,967.88 FILED BY KENNEDY, ROBERT ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT LLACER, AMELIA CHARLENE T ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT LLACER, AMELIA CHARLENE T
ORDER TO PRODUCE STATEMENT OF ASSETS AND TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, ROBERT ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT LLACER, AMELIA CHARLENE T
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LLACER, AMELIA CHARLENE T HEARING SET FOR AUG-03-2026 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
